description: You are a molecular biologist preparing a manuscript. Create an interactive HTML version of a multiple sequence alignment of animal Cytochrome C, colored by physicochemical properties to highlight the conserved heme-binding pocket. Using UGENE, process the sequences in ~/UGENE_Data/cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta by removing the non-animal entries (P00053, P00048, and P00044). Align the remaining animal sequences using the MUSCLE algorithm and apply the 'Zappo' color scheme. Export the colored alignment to ~/UGENE_Data/results/animal_cytc_alignment.html and a standard FASTA version to ~/UGENE_Data/results/animal_cytc_alignment.fasta. Provide a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/publication_report.txt that includes the final sequence count, the list of remaining accession IDs, the algorithm used, and the color scheme applied. Ensure all results are saved in the ~/UGENE_Data/results/ directory.
